mode.label: 1 VS CPU
mode.purpose: Primary browser v1 fight mode for proving feel, HUD, round flow, and CPU pressure.
mode.description: Best-of-three CPU fight using the current roster and difficulty setting.

roster.truthLine: 4 PLAYABLE NOW  |  4 PLANNED LOCKED FOR MODEL-SHEET QA

p1.storyHook: Wants the treat belt to fund a luxury cardboard castle with a strict no-cats door policy.
p1.trainingTip: Use hops and light kicks to test spacing before committing to a heavy punish.

championship.rivalIntro: Bunjamin enters with courtroom ears, insisting the cardboard castle deed is binding if the crowd stays quiet.
championship.advancePayoff: Bunjamin stamps the fallen rival with one dusty heel tap and asks whether the couch has zoning laws.
championship.titleClaim: Bunjamin dedicates the Snackbelt to every cardboard box that believed it could become real estate.
championship.runEnd: Bunjamin files a tiny complaint, calls the loss a procedural hop, and protects the cardboard castle anyway.

p2.storyHook: Wants the belt because the prize couch is clearly already his and everyone else missed the memo.
p2.trainingTip: Stay close, chain quick swats, and spend meter when the opponent tries to hop away.

championship.rivalIntro: Marmalade Mayhem pads in like the couch has hired him personally to remove all unworthy sitters.
championship.advancePayoff: Marmalade paws the scorecard flat, flicks couch fur at the camera, and accepts applause as rent.
championship.titleClaim: Marmalade claims the good couch by royal nap law and leaves the Snackbelt warm from dramatic posing.
championship.runEnd: Marmalade pretends the loss was an intermission, then demands the couch save his spot for revenge.

championship.runEnd: Bunjamin files a tiny complaint, calls the loss a procedural hop, and protects the cardboard castle anyway.

p2.controls: P2 manual arrows + Numpad, or CPU

cpu.summary: C toggles CPU/manual, V changes level, current NORMAL CPU

actions: No key rebinding in browser v1

runtimeRoster.storyHook: Entered after hearing the trophy was edible, which nobody has successfully disproved.
runtimeRoster.trainingTip: Walk opponents down with guard pressure and cash out when they panic jump.

championship.rivalIntro: Pickles waddles to center ring sniff-testing the edible trophy theory with absolute scientific confidence.
championship.advancePayoff: Pickles wheezes through the count, pockets the stamp, and asks if edible trophies come in bulk packs.
championship.titleClaim: Pickles declares the Snackbelt mostly edible, which is legally close enough for a champion pug.
championship.runEnd: Pickles loses the round but not the edible trophy hypothesis, which remains under urgent review.

runtimeRoster.storyHook: Needs the prize money to buy every sock in the neighborhood and hide them responsibly.
runtimeRoster.trainingTip: Use side switches to make guard direction and spacing feel unstable.

championship.rivalIntro: Noodle Nibbles appears from behind the bracket table with a sock ledger and several suspicious alibis.
championship.advancePayoff: Noodle coils around the stamp, marks one rival as folded, and allocates prize money to sock security.
championship.titleClaim: Noodle claims the Snackbelt, the sock budget, and three exits nobody noticed until the lights came up.
championship.runEnd: Noodle loses the run, denies all sock allegations, and vanishes with the consolation towel anyway.

runtimeStance.rule: normal gameplay is upright-two-legged for both fighters; grounded-prone-reaction is reserved for knockdown/lose presentation

stageRuntime.promptIntent: Vibrant blue sky, warm sun rays, lens flare, and soft atmosphere.
Distant colorful hills and city shapes behind the arena.
Low stone walls, courtyard pillars, and readable architectural depth.
Scattered trees and bushes that frame the fight without covering silhouettes.
Bright stone-paved fighting lane with stable gameplay readability.
Subtle foreground leaves, dust puffs, and edge props for parallax motion.

championship.runEnd: Marmalade pretends the loss was an intermission, then demands the couch save his spot for revenge.

runtimeRoster.storyHook: Entered after hearing the trophy was edible, which nobody has successfully disproved.
runtimeRoster.trainingTip: Walk opponents down with guard pressure and cash out when they panic jump.

championship.rivalIntro: Pickles waddles to center ring sniff-testing the edible trophy theory with absolute scientific confidence.
championship.advancePayoff: Pickles wheezes through the count, pockets the stamp, and asks if edible trophies come in bulk packs.
championship.titleClaim: Pickles declares the Snackbelt mostly edible, which is legally close enough for a champion pug.
championship.runEnd: Pickles loses the round but not the edible trophy hypothesis, which remains under urgent review.

runtimeRoster.storyHook: Needs the prize money to buy every sock in the neighborhood and hide them responsibly.
runtimeRoster.trainingTip: Use side switches to make guard direction and spacing feel unstable.

championship.rivalIntro: Noodle Nibbles appears from behind the bracket table with a sock ledger and several suspicious alibis.
championship.advancePayoff: Noodle coils around the stamp, marks one rival as folded, and allocates prize money to sock security.
championship.titleClaim: Noodle claims the Snackbelt, the sock budget, and three exits nobody noticed until the lights came up.
championship.runEnd: Noodle loses the run, denies all sock allegations, and vanishes with the consolation towel anyway.

stageRuntime.promptIntent: Vibrant blue sky, warm sun rays, lens flare, and soft atmosphere.
Distant colorful hills and city shapes behind the arena.
Low stone walls, courtyard pillars, and readable architectural depth.
Scattered trees and bushes that frame the fight without covering silhouettes.
Bright stone-paved fighting lane with stable gameplay readability.
Subtle foreground leaves, dust puffs, and edge props for parallax motion.

combat-readability-special.coordinateSystem: origin top-left, x right, y down

mode.purpose: Primary browser v1 fight mode for proving feel, HUD, round flow, and CPU pressure.
mode.description: Best-of-three CPU fight using the current roster and difficulty setting.

Low stone walls, courtyard pillars, and readable architectural depth.

Bright stone-paved fighting lane with stable gameplay readability.
Subtle foreground leaves, dust puffs, and edge props for parallax motion.

championship.rivalIntro: Marmalade Mayhem pads in like the couch has hired him personally to remove all unworthy sitters.

championship.titleClaim: Marmalade claims the good couch by royal nap law and leaves the Snackbelt warm from dramatic posing.
championship.runEnd: Marmalade pretends the loss was an intermission, then demands the couch save his spot for revenge.

championship.rivalIntro: Pickles waddles to center ring sniff-testing the edible trophy theory with absolute scientific confidence.
championship.advancePayoff: Pickles wheezes through the count, pockets the stamp, and asks if edible trophies come in bulk packs.
championship.titleClaim: Pickles declares the Snackbelt mostly edible, which is legally close enough for a champion pug.
championship.runEnd: Pickles loses the round but not the edible trophy hypothesis, which remains under urgent review.

runtimeRoster.storyHook: Needs the prize money to buy every sock in the neighborhood and hide them responsibly.
runtimeRoster.trainingTip: Use side switches to make guard direction and spacing feel unstable.

championship.rivalIntro: Noodle Nibbles appears from behind the bracket table with a sock ledger and several suspicious alibis.
championship.advancePayoff: Noodle coils around the stamp, marks one rival as folded, and allocates prize money to sock security.
championship.titleClaim: Noodle claims the Snackbelt, the sock budget, and three exits nobody noticed until the lights came up.
championship.runEnd: Noodle loses the run, denies all sock allegations, and vanishes with the consolation towel anyway.

stageRuntime.promptIntent: Vibrant blue sky, warm sun rays, lens flare, and soft atmosphere.
Distant colorful hills and city shapes behind the arena.
Low stone walls, courtyard pillars, and readable architectural depth.
Scattered trees and bushes that frame the fight without covering silhouettes.
Bright stone-paved fighting lane with stable gameplay readability.
Subtle foreground leaves, dust puffs, and edge props for parallax motion.

championship.runEnd: Noodle loses the run, denies all sock allegations, and vanishes with the consolation towel anyway.

stageRuntime.promptIntent: Vibrant blue sky, warm sun rays, lens flare, and soft atmosphere.
Distant colorful hills and city shapes behind the arena.
Low stone walls, courtyard pillars, and readable architectural depth.
Scattered trees and bushes that frame the fight without covering silhouettes.
Bright stone-paved fighting lane with stable gameplay readability.
Subtle foreground leaves, dust puffs, and edge props for parallax motion.

championship.rivalIntro: Marmalade Mayhem pads in like the couch has hired him personally to remove all unworthy sitters.
championship.advancePayoff: Marmalade paws the scorecard flat, flicks couch fur at the camera, and accepts applause as rent.
championship.titleClaim: Marmalade claims the good couch by royal nap law and leaves the Snackbelt warm from dramatic posing.
championship.runEnd: Marmalade pretends the loss was an intermission, then demands the couch save his spot for revenge.

stageRuntime.promptIntent: Vibrant blue sky, warm sun rays, lens flare, and soft atmosphere.
Distant colorful hills and city shapes behind the arena.
Low stone walls, courtyard pillars, and readable architectural depth.
Scattered trees and bushes that frame the fight without covering silhouettes.
Bright stone-paved fighting lane with stable gameplay readability.
Subtle foreground leaves, dust puffs, and edge props for parallax motion.

stageRuntime.promptIntent: Vibrant blue sky, warm sun rays, lens flare, and soft atmosphere.

Low stone walls, courtyard pillars, and readable architectural depth.

Subtle foreground leaves, dust puffs, and edge props for parallax motion.

runtimeRoster.storyHook: Entered after hearing the trophy was edible, which nobody has successfully disproved.
runtimeRoster.trainingTip: Walk opponents down with guard pressure and cash out when they panic jump.

championship.rivalIntro: Pickles waddles to center ring sniff-testing the edible trophy theory with absolute scientific confidence.
championship.advancePayoff: Pickles wheezes through the count, pockets the stamp, and asks if edible trophies come in bulk packs.
championship.titleClaim: Pickles declares the Snackbelt mostly edible, which is legally close enough for a champion pug.
championship.runEnd: Pickles loses the round but not the edible trophy hypothesis, which remains under urgent review.

runtimeRoster.storyHook: Needs the prize money to buy every sock in the neighborhood and hide them responsibly.
runtimeRoster.trainingTip: Use side switches to make guard direction and spacing feel unstable.

championship.rivalIntro: Noodle Nibbles appears from behind the bracket table with a sock ledger and several suspicious alibis.
championship.advancePayoff: Noodle coils around the stamp, marks one rival as folded, and allocates prize money to sock security.
championship.titleClaim: Noodle claims the Snackbelt, the sock budget, and three exits nobody noticed until the lights came up.
championship.runEnd: Noodle loses the run, denies all sock allegations, and vanishes with the consolation towel anyway.

stageRuntime.promptIntent: Vibrant blue sky, warm sun rays, lens flare, and soft atmosphere.
Distant colorful hills and city shapes behind the arena.
Low stone walls, courtyard pillars, and readable architectural depth.
Scattered trees and bushes that frame the fight without covering silhouettes.
Bright stone-paved fighting lane with stable gameplay readability.
Subtle foreground leaves, dust puffs, and edge props for parallax motion.

championship.runEnd: Bunjamin files a tiny complaint, calls the loss a procedural hop, and protects the cardboard castle anyway.

fighter.storyHook: Wants the belt because the prize couch is clearly already his and everyone else missed the memo.
fighter.trainingTip: Stay close, chain quick swats, and spend meter when the opponent tries to hop away.

championship.rivalIntro: Marmalade Mayhem pads in like the couch has hired him personally to remove all unworthy sitters.
championship.advancePayoff: Marmalade paws the scorecard flat, flicks couch fur at the camera, and accepts applause as rent.
championship.titleClaim: Marmalade claims the good couch by royal nap law and leaves the Snackbelt warm from dramatic posing.
championship.runEnd: Marmalade pretends the loss was an intermission, then demands the couch save his spot for revenge.

runtimeRoster.storyHook: Entered after hearing the trophy was edible, which nobody has successfully disproved.
runtimeRoster.trainingTip: Walk opponents down with guard pressure and cash out when they panic jump.

championship.rivalIntro: Pickles waddles to center ring sniff-testing the edible trophy theory with absolute scientific confidence.
championship.advancePayoff: Pickles wheezes through the count, pockets the stamp, and asks if edible trophies come in bulk packs.
championship.titleClaim: Pickles declares the Snackbelt mostly edible, which is legally close enough for a champion pug.
championship.runEnd: Pickles loses the round but not the edible trophy hypothesis, which remains under urgent review.

runtimeRoster.storyHook: Needs the prize money to buy every sock in the neighborhood and hide them responsibly.
runtimeRoster.trainingTip: Use side switches to make guard direction and spacing feel unstable.

championship.rivalIntro: Noodle Nibbles appears from behind the bracket table with a sock ledger and several suspicious alibis.
championship.advancePayoff: Noodle coils around the stamp, marks one rival as folded, and allocates prize money to sock security.
championship.titleClaim: Noodle claims the Snackbelt, the sock budget, and three exits nobody noticed until the lights came up.
championship.runEnd: Noodle loses the run, denies all sock allegations, and vanishes with the consolation towel anyway.

stageRuntime.promptIntent: Vibrant blue sky, warm sun rays, lens flare, and soft atmosphere.
Distant colorful hills and city shapes behind the arena.
Low stone walls, courtyard pillars, and readable architectural depth.
Scattered trees and bushes that frame the fight without covering silhouettes.
Bright stone-paved fighting lane with stable gameplay readability.
Subtle foreground leaves, dust puffs, and edge props for parallax motion.

runtimeRoster.trainingTip: Stay close, chain quick swats, and spend meter when the opponent tries to hop away.

championship.rivalIntro: Marmalade Mayhem pads in like the couch has hired him personally to remove all unworthy sitters.

championship.titleClaim: Marmalade claims the good couch by royal nap law and leaves the Snackbelt warm from dramatic posing.
championship.runEnd: Marmalade pretends the loss was an intermission, then demands the couch save his spot for revenge.

championship.runEnd: Pickles loses the round but not the edible trophy hypothesis, which remains under urgent review.

runtimeRoster.storyHook: Needs the prize money to buy every sock in the neighborhood and hide them responsibly.
runtimeRoster.trainingTip: Use side switches to make guard direction and spacing feel unstable.

championship.rivalIntro: Noodle Nibbles appears from behind the bracket table with a sock ledger and several suspicious alibis.
championship.advancePayoff: Noodle coils around the stamp, marks one rival as folded, and allocates prize money to sock security.
championship.titleClaim: Noodle claims the Snackbelt, the sock budget, and three exits nobody noticed until the lights came up.
championship.runEnd: Noodle loses the run, denies all sock allegations, and vanishes with the consolation towel anyway.

p1.storyHook: Wants the treat belt to fund a luxury cardboard castle with a strict no-cats door policy.
p1.trainingTip: Use hops and light kicks to test spacing before committing to a heavy punish.

championship.rivalIntro: Bunjamin enters with courtroom ears, insisting the cardboard castle deed is binding if the crowd stays quiet.
championship.advancePayoff: Bunjamin stamps the fallen rival with one dusty heel tap and asks whether the couch has zoning laws.
championship.titleClaim: Bunjamin dedicates the Snackbelt to every cardboard box that believed it could become real estate.
championship.runEnd: Bunjamin files a tiny complaint, calls the loss a procedural hop, and protects the cardboard castle anyway.

p2.storyHook: Wants the belt because the prize couch is clearly already his and everyone else missed the memo.
p2.trainingTip: Stay close, chain quick swats, and spend meter when the opponent tries to hop away.

championship.rivalIntro: Marmalade Mayhem pads in like the couch has hired him personally to remove all unworthy sitters.
championship.advancePayoff: Marmalade paws the scorecard flat, flicks couch fur at the camera, and accepts applause as rent.
championship.titleClaim: Marmalade claims the good couch by royal nap law and leaves the Snackbelt warm from dramatic posing.
championship.runEnd: Marmalade pretends the loss was an intermission, then demands the couch save his spot for revenge.

runtimeStance.rule: normal gameplay is upright-two-legged for both fighters; grounded-prone-reaction is reserved for knockdown/lose presentation

stageRuntime.promptIntent: Vibrant blue sky, warm sun rays, lens flare, and soft atmosphere.
Distant colorful hills and city shapes behind the arena.
Low stone walls, courtyard pillars, and readable architectural depth.
Scattered trees and bushes that frame the fight without covering silhouettes.
Bright stone-paved fighting lane with stable gameplay readability.
Subtle foreground leaves, dust puffs, and edge props for parallax motion.

state.coordinateSystem: origin top-left, x right, y down

mode.label: 1 VS CPU
mode.purpose: Primary browser v1 fight mode for proving feel, HUD, round flow, and CPU pressure.
mode.description: Best-of-three CPU fight using the current roster and difficulty setting.
